productDisplayName: Denizen Men Beige & Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Note denizen's new range of casual shirts inject an effortlessly stylish aesthetic into your off-duty wardrobe with their classic cuts and vintage themed prints. This shirt is a versatile addition to your off-duty ensemble as it can be worn with jeans for a chilled out look or with chinos for a sharper look. Product Details Beige, brown and blue check shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two patch pockets on the chest with a buttoned patch pocket inside the left patch pocket, back yoke and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
